title: Stress-cycle factor for bending strength K_L (Y_NT) for carburized case-hardened steel bevel gears

piecewise_expressions.note: Constant plateau shown at low cycle counts.
Intermediate-cycle correlation shown on the figure.
The figure shows two high-cycle correlations defining an upper and lower branch/band. The selection criterion is not stated on the figure itself.

selection_note: The figure presents two alternate high-cycle correlations after the knee near 3×10^6 cycles. The exhibit alone does not state the decision rule for choosing the upper versus lower branch.
notes_from_figure: The choice of K_L (Y_NT) is influenced by pitch-line velocity.
The choice of K_L (Y_NT) is influenced by gear material cleanliness.
The choice of K_L (Y_NT) is influenced by residual stress.
The choice of K_L (Y_NT) is influenced by material ductility and fracture toughness.
